## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on Exec's product, target audience, and content strategy goals for GrowthX engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Exec's primary focus is on AI-powered role-plays and comprehensive L\&D programs for mid-to-large companies (500+ employees)](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Content strategy aims to drive organic traffic and seed AI engines with Exec's methodologies](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Key differentiator is customizable, outcomes-focused simulation-based learning integrated with existing L\&D programs](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Seasonality in demand exists (e.g., feedback training in Dec/Jan, expectation management rest of year)](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Exec's Product and Target Audience

  - [Primary offering: AI-powered role-plays and comprehensive L\&D programs](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Target industries: Tech, healthcare, professional services, biotech](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Company size: 500+ employees (resourced enough for Exec's services)](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Key buyers: Head of L\&D (80%), Head of Sales Enablement (20%)](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Differentiator: Customizable, simulation-based learning integrated with existing programs](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

### Content Strategy Goals

  - [Drive organic traffic through SEO](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Seed AI engines (e.g., ChatGPT) with Exec's methodologies](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Retarget visitors and build email list for nurturing](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Compete for "share of voice" in LLMs using Profound for measurement](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)

### Current Content Infrastructure

  - [Using Contentful CMS, synced to backend](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [\~200 existing articles on placement.com/learn](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=2856.0)
  - [Content serves dual purpose: public-facing and in-product learning material](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=2877.0)
  - [Technical SEO improvements underway (page speed, web upsells, SSR)](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=2723.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Few direct competitors in AI role-play space (e.g., Hyperbound, Seismic)](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [Indirect competition from traditional L\&D consultants and LXPs (e.g., Degreed)](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [Exec's all-in-one approach (coaching, role-plays, orchestration) is a key advantage](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)

### Content Development Process

  - [AI-generated programs and templates in development](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=2959.0)
  - [Professional instructional designer creating initial high-quality templates](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=3015.0)
  - [Plan to scale up to thousands of AI-generated templates based on initial examples](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=3022.0)

### Seasonality and Demand

  - [Manager training most in-demand service](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Seasonal trends: feedback training (Dec/Jan), expectation management (rest of year)](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=3466.0)
  - [Often reactive to immediate needs rather than proactive planning](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=3574.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up call for next week to review initial research and content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=3064.0)
  - [Sean to share additional materials: product vision doc, sales collateral, and upcoming program roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=3412.0)
  - [GrowthX team to request access to Contentful, Google Search Console, and GA](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Begin development of calibration articles for feedback on voice, tone, and structure](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=3096.0)
  - [Explore Profound data for potential link-building opportunities in LLM-favored sources](https://fathom.video/share/ksVW5NQKv6irXdQDY7xWza71x4UnvTxx?tab=summary&timestamp=3319.0)
